'''Agash''' was a [[Red giant/Legends|red giant]] and the [[Agash system/Legends|Agash system's]] primary [[Star/Legends|star]], it was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by a lone [[Planet/Legends|planet]], [[Ergeshui/Legends|Ergeshui]].

{{Star-stub}}
